cookie_expiration_period.description: Defines the lifespan of the cookie in seconds for maintaining session stickiness, with a valid range of 1 to 604800 seconds.

lb_port.description: Specifies the load balancer listener port to which the stickiness policy should be applied; must match an existing listener port.

load_balancer.description: Specifies the name or ARN of the load balancer to associate with the stickiness policy.

name.description: Specifies the unique name for the cookie stickiness policy, which must be alphanumeric and unique within the load balancer.
